team.name: Team Paradox
team.tagline: Crafting digital solutions, one byte at a time
team.description: We are a passionate team of student developers at IET Gorakhpur, building innovative projects, contributing to open source, and pushing the boundaries of technology. Our diverse skill set spans full-stack development, machine learning, DevOps, and UI/UX design.
team.mission: To foster a collaborative environment where students can learn, build, and innovate together while making meaningful contributions to the tech community.

highlights.title: Open Source
highlights.desc: Active contributors to the open-source ecosystem

highlights.title: Innovation
highlights.desc: Building cutting-edge solutions for real-world problems

highlights.title: Learning
highlights.desc: Continuous skill development and knowledge sharing

highlights.title: Community
highlights.desc: Growing a strong tech community on campus

achievements.title: Team Founded
achievements.desc: Team paradox was established with 4 founding members at IET Gorakhpur, by Anshika Singh.

achievements.title: First Hackathon participation
achievements.desc: Participated in Samsung Innovation Campus hackathon and contributed to group project for CivicSetu.

achievements.title: Paranox2.0 Shortlisted
achievements.desc: Secured a ranking in top 40 teams out of 1000+teams and 20,000 registrations of Paranox2.O hackathon organized by TechXNinjas at Newtons Schools of Technology, Sonipat.

achievements.title: RIFT'26 Shortlisted
achievements.desc: Got shortlisted for RIFT'26 hackathon organized by PW IoI, at Lucknow, made it to semi-finals
